channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo helps Al Nassr secure first Saudi Pro League championship since 2019
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo don finally help Al Nassr lift their first Saudi Pro League trophy since 2019, ending a seven-year dry spell for domestic glory. The Portuguese superstar shine for the Riyadh club as...

item.title: Reflections on Post-Colonial Ghana and the Lessons for Modern Africa
item.description: Orapeleng Matshediso reviews Ayi Kwei Armah’s seminal novel, 'The Beautyful Ones Are Not Yet Born', written ten years after Ghana gained independence. The novel exposes the social decay, corruption, a...

item.title: Gaza flotilla activists arrive in Turkey, report mistreatment by Israeli forces
item.description: A group of activists involved in the Gaza flotilla arrived safely in Istanbul, Turkey, after a tense confrontation at sea with Israeli forces. Wearing grey tracksuits and Arab keffiyehs, the activists...

item.title: FG launches GovGuideNigeria AI platform to simplify access to government services
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don roll out new AI-powered platform wey dem call GovGuideNigeria. The platform go make am easier for Nigerians to get government information and public services anyt...

item.title: The History and Legacy of Girlschool, Pioneering All-Female British Rock Band
item.description: Girlschool is a British rock band that emerged during the new wave of British heavy metal in 1978. Initially formed from a school band called Painted Lady, the band gained significant attention in the...

item.title: US Confident of Concluding India Trade Deal Soon, Says Ambassador
item.description: The United States has expressed optimism about concluding a bilateral trade agreement with India, according to US Ambassador Sergio Gor. Speaking at an event organised by the American Chamber of Comme...

item.title: David Pope shares his editorial cartoons on ageing at home
item.description: This piece presents the editorial perspective of David Pope, the Canberra Times' cartoonist, focusing on the theme of 'ageing in place.' Pope provides a satirical lens on contemporary news, using humo...

item.title: Study finds thawing permafrost contaminating northern Canadian rivers
item.description: A recent study has revealed that northern rivers in Canada are increasingly affected by the thawing of permafrost, which exposes ancient bedrock and releases toxic metals into the water. Researchers r...

item.title: Ghana Immigration Service Trains Officers Ahead of Nationwide E-Visa Rollout
item.description: The Ghana Immigration Service (GIS) is preparing for the nationwide launch of Ghana's electronic visa (e-visa) system, scheduled for May 25, 2026. To ensure smooth implementation, GIS recently conduct...

item.title: James Carville Advocates Targeting Republican Party Switchers in the Southern U.S.
item.description: Democratic strategist James Carville has proposed a new initiative aimed at attracting Republicans in the traditionally conservative Southern states to the Democratic Party. Speaking on his Politicon ...

item.title: Government urges media and information officers to register with JAB for professional recognition
item.description: Information officers working in both government and private institutions in Tanzania have been urged to register with the Journalists Accreditation Board (JAB) to be formally recognized as part of the...

item.title: Senator Isah Jibrin Firmly Denies Rumours of Stepping Down from 2027 Kogi East Senate Race
item.description: Senator Isah Jibrin of Kogi East don come out strongly to dismiss all those reports wey claim say him don agree to step down from the All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial primaries for the 2027 ...

item.title: Blood vs Duty Episode 34: Teresa Breaks Down Recounting Gabriel's Disappearance to Jalil
item.description: In the latest episode of the hit ABS-CBN teleserye 'Blood vs Duty', viewers witnessed an emotional moment as Teresa, played by Bela Padilla, broke down in tears while sharing the painful story of Gabr...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo Scores Twice as Al Nassr Clinch Saudi Pro League Title
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, the 41-year-old Portuguese superstar, score two goals as him Al Nassr team beat Damac 4-1 to win the Saudi Pro League title on Thursday. This victory end Ronaldo long wait for domes...

item.title: Prince William Celebrates Aston Villa Victory with Childhood Friends
item.description: Prince William, the Prince of Wales, enjoyed a night out with some of his oldest friends following Aston Villa's triumphant 3-0 win over SC Freiburg in the UEFA Europa League Final in Istanbul, markin...

item.title: Ekiti State: Vice Chairman of Ilejemeje LGA Rescued Unharmed After Kidnapping
item.description: Mrs. Grace Ogunleye, the Vice Chairman of Ilejemeje Local Government Area for Ekiti State, was abducted on Wednesday by armed men while she dey return from official engagement along Ipere-Iludun road....

item.title: Jason Dy Shares Insights on His Musical Journey and Memorable Performances
item.description: Jason Dy, a celebrated Filipino singer, recently opened up about his experiences in music and performing on stage. He shared how his passion for music has shaped his career and allowed him to connect ...

item.title: Alberta Launches Highway 3 Tourism Corridor to Boost Travel and Visitation
item.description: Alberta has introduced a new tourism initiative along Highway 3 designed to streamline travel planning and attract more visitors to the region. The project focuses on enhancing the corridor's appeal b...

item.title: Senator Escudero under formal Comelec investigation over 2022 campaign donations
item.description: Senator Francis 'Chiz' Escudero is facing a renewed investigation by the Commission on Elections (Comelec) regarding alleged illegal campaign donations he received during his 2022 senatorial campaign....

item.title: Willy Sluiter: Celebrating the Life and Art of a Dutch Master
item.description: Willy Sluiter (1873–1949) was a distinguished Dutch painter and graphic artist whose work captured the spirit of early 20th-century life with both elegance and authenticity. Born into a well-off famil...
